title: crataegus punctata var. xanthocarpa
intro: Crataegus punctata var. xanthocarpa, also known as the yellow-fruited hawthorn, is a variety of the hawthorn plant, which is a deciduous shrub or small tree with thorny branches and clusters of small, white flowers. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which help to protect against cardiovascular disease and other conditions. The health benefits of Crataegus punctata var. xanthocarpa include reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular function, and enhancing overall heart health. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, capsules, or tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its effects.
